skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>clawhub</name>
    <description>Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/clawhub/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/coding-agent/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>gh-issues</name>
    <description>Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/gh-issues/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>github</name>
    <description>GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/github/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>gog</name>
    <description>Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/gog/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>mcporter</name>
    <description>Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/mcporter/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/node-connect/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/pro/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>tmux</name>
    <description>Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/tmux/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>video-frames</name>
    <description>Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/video-frames/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>wacli</name>
    <description>Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/wacli/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>abby-watch</name>
    <description>Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/abby-watch/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-workflow</name>
    <description>系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/coding-workflow/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>long-term-memory</name>
    <description>Persistent file-based memory system for AI agents with semantic search, importance scoring, and auto-consolidation. Use when building long-term memory across sessions, tracking decisions/insights/learnings, or needing fast memory search (<20ms).</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/long-term-memory/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>market-intel-assistant</name>
    <description>综合使用 Bird + web_search + CoinGecko 获取市场资讯。适用于获取加密货币、股票、大宗商品等实时信息，包括实时讨论、社区情绪、深度分析和价格数据。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/market-intel-assistant/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>mlx-stt</name>
    <description>Speech-To-Text with MLX (Apple Silicon) and opensource models (default GLM-ASR-Nano-2512) locally.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/mlx-stt/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>research-strategy</name>
    <description>自主研究新交易策略的完整流程。必须用 market-intel-assistant 搜索！包含：搜索→实现→回测→评估→决策→记录→循环。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/research-strategy/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>Agent Development</name>
    <description>This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "add an agent", "write a subagent", "agent frontmatter", "when to use description", "agent examples", "agent tools", "agent colors", "autonomous agent", or needs guidance on agent structure, system prompts, triggering conditions, or agent development best practices for Claude Code plugins.</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/Agent Development/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>SQLite Database Expert</name>
    <description>Expert in SQLite embedded database development for Tauri/desktop applications with focus on SQL injection prevention, migrations, FTS search, and secure data handling</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/SQLite Database Expert/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>agent-browser</name>
    <description>Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/agent-browser/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>chrome-devtools</name>
    <description>Expert-level browser automation, debugging, and performance analysis using Chrome DevTools MCP. Use for interacting with web pages, capturing screenshots, analyzing network traffic, and profiling performance.</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/chrome-devtools/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>connect-apps</name>
    <description>Connect Claude to external apps like Gmail, Slack, GitHub. Use this skill when the user wants to send emails, create issues, post messages, or take actions in external services.</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/connect-apps/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>deployment-engineer</name>
    <description>Expert Deployment Engineer specializing in CI/CD automation, containerization, and release management across diverse platforms. Proficient in Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Azure DevOps, and modern deployment strategies including blue-green deployments and canary releases.</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/deployment-engineer/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>gh-fix-ci</name>
    <description>Use when a user asks to debug or fix failing GitHub PR checks that run in GitHub Actions; use `gh` to inspect checks and logs, summarize failure context, draft a fix plan, and implement only after explicit approval. Treat external providers (for example Buildkite) as out of scope and report only the details URL.</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/gh-fix-ci/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>mcp-hub</name>
    <description>Access 1200+ AI Agent tools via Model Context Protocol (MCP)</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/mcp-hub/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>python</name>
    <description>Python coding guidelines and best practices. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Python code. Enforces PEP 8 style, syntax validation via py_compile, unit test execution, modern Python versions only (no EOL), uv for dependency management when available, and idiomatic Pythonic patterns.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/python/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>qmd</name>
    <description>Search and retrieve markdown documents from local knowledge bases using qmd. Supports BM25 keyword search, vector semantic search, and hybrid search with LLM re-ranking. Use for querying indexed notes, documentation, meeting transcripts, and any markdown-based knowledge. Requires qmd CLI installed (bun install -g https://github.com/tobi/qmd).</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/qmd/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>Skills Usage Guide</name>
    <description>Abby 的 Skills 使用指南。包含所有已安装的 Skills 和 MCPs 的索引，以及如何使用它们的指南。触发词：skills、运用、指南、使用 skill、mcp、工具。</description>
    <location>~/.agents/skills/skills-usage/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>time-checker</name>
    <description>Check accurate current time, date, and timezone information for any location worldwide using time.is. Use when the user asks "what time is it in X", "current time in Y", or needs to verify timezone offsets.</description>

    <name>webapp-testing</name>

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator

resolvedSkills.name: wacli

resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: video-frames
resolvedSkills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

resolvedSkills.name: wacli
resolvedSkills.description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: abby-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: long-term-memory

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: video-frames
resolvedSkills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

resolvedSkills.name: wacli
resolvedSkills.description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: abby-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: long-term-memory
resolvedSkills.description: Persistent file-based memory system for AI agents with semantic search, importance scoring, and auto-consolidation. Use when building long-term memory across sessions, tracking decisions/insights/learnings, or needing fast memory search (<20ms).

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: video-frames
resolvedSkills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

resolvedSkills.name: wacli
resolvedSkills.description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: abby-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: long-term-memory
resolvedSkills.description: Persistent file-based memory system for AI agents with semantic search, importance scoring, and auto-consolidation. Use when building long-term memory across sessions, tracking decisions/insights/learnings, or needing fast memory search (<20ms).

resolvedSkills.name: market-intel-assistant
resolvedSkills.description: 综合使用 Bird + web_search + CoinGecko 获取市场资讯。适用于获取加密货币、股票、大宗商品等实时信息，包括实时讨论、社区情绪、深度分析和价格数据。

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: video-frames
resolvedSkills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

resolvedSkills.name: wacli
resolvedSkills.description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: abby-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: long-term-memory
resolvedSkills.description: Persistent file-based memory system for AI agents with semantic search, importance scoring, and auto-consolidation. Use when building long-term memory across sessions, tracking decisions/insights/learnings, or needing fast memory search (<20ms).

resolvedSkills.name: market-intel-assistant
resolvedSkills.description: 综合使用 Bird + web_search + CoinGecko 获取市场资讯。适用于获取加密货币、股票、大宗商品等实时信息，包括实时讨论、社区情绪、深度分析和价格数据。

resolvedSkills.name: mlx-stt
resolvedSkills.description: Speech-To-Text with MLX (Apple Silicon) and opensource models (default GLM-ASR-Nano-2512) locally.

resolvedSkills.name: research-strategy
resolvedSkills.description: 自主研究新交易策略的完整流程。必须用 market-intel-assistant 搜索！包含：搜索→实现→回测→评估→决策→记录→循环。

resolvedSkills.name: Agent Development
resolvedSkills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "add an agent", "write a subagent", "agent frontmatter", "when to use description", "agent examples", "agent tools", "agent colors", "autonomous agent", or needs guidance on agent structure, system prompts, triggering conditions, or agent development best practices for Claude Code plugins.

resolvedSkills.name: SQLite Database Expert
resolvedSkills.description: Expert in SQLite embedded database development for Tauri/desktop applications with focus on SQL injection prevention, migrations, FTS search, and secure data handling

resolvedSkills.name: agent-browser
resolvedSkills.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.

resolvedSkills.name: chrome-devtools
resolvedSkills.description: Expert-level browser automation, debugging, and performance analysis using Chrome DevTools MCP. Use for interacting with web pages, capturing screenshots, analyzing network traffic, and profiling performance.

resolvedSkills.name: connect-apps
resolvedSkills.description: Connect Claude to external apps like Gmail, Slack, GitHub. Use this skill when the user wants to send emails, create issues, post messages, or take actions in external services.

resolvedSkills.name: deployment-engineer
resolvedSkills.description: Expert Deployment Engineer specializing in CI/CD automation, containerization, and release management across diverse platforms. Proficient in Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Azure DevOps, and modern deployment strategies including blue-green deployments and canary releases.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: video-frames
resolvedSkills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

resolvedSkills.name: wacli
resolvedSkills.description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: abby-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: long-term-memory
resolvedSkills.description: Persistent file-based memory system for AI agents with semantic search, importance scoring, and auto-consolidation. Use when building long-term memory across sessions, tracking decisions/insights/learnings, or needing fast memory search (<20ms).

resolvedSkills.name: market-intel-assistant
resolvedSkills.description: 综合使用 Bird + web_search + CoinGecko 获取市场资讯。适用于获取加密货币、股票、大宗商品等实时信息，包括实时讨论、社区情绪、深度分析和价格数据。

resolvedSkills.name: mlx-stt
resolvedSkills.description: Speech-To-Text with MLX (Apple Silicon) and opensource models (default GLM-ASR-Nano-2512) locally.

resolvedSkills.name: research-strategy
resolvedSkills.description: 自主研究新交易策略的完整流程。必须用 market-intel-assistant 搜索！包含：搜索→实现→回测→评估→决策→记录→循环。

resolvedSkills.name: Agent Development
resolvedSkills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "add an agent", "write a subagent", "agent frontmatter", "when to use description", "agent examples", "agent tools", "agent colors", "autonomous agent", or needs guidance on agent structure, system prompts, triggering conditions, or agent development best practices for Claude Code plugins.

resolvedSkills.name: SQLite Database Expert
resolvedSkills.description: Expert in SQLite embedded database development for Tauri/desktop applications with focus on SQL injection prevention, migrations, FTS search, and secure data handling

resolvedSkills.name: agent-browser
resolvedSkills.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.

resolvedSkills.name: connect-apps

resolvedSkills.name: deployment-engineer
resolvedSkills.description: Expert Deployment Engineer specializing in CI/CD automation, containerization, and release management across diverse platforms. resolvedSkills.name: gh-fix-ci

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: video-frames
resolvedSkills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

resolvedSkills.name: wacli
resolvedSkills.description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: abby-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: long-term-memory
resolvedSkills.description: Persistent file-based memory system for AI agents with semantic search, importance scoring, and auto-consolidation. Use when building long-term memory across sessions, tracking decisions/insights/learnings, or needing fast memory search (<20ms).

resolvedSkills.name: market-intel-assistant
resolvedSkills.description: 综合使用 Bird + web_search + CoinGecko 获取市场资讯。适用于获取加密货币、股票、大宗商品等实时信息，包括实时讨论、社区情绪、深度分析和价格数据。

resolvedSkills.name: mlx-stt

resolvedSkills.name: research-strategy
resolvedSkills.description: 自主研究新交易策略的完整流程。必须用 market-intel-assistant 搜索！包含：搜索→实现→回测→评估→决策→记录→循环。

resolvedSkills.name: Agent Development
resolvedSkills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "add an agent", "write a subagent", "agent frontmatter", "when to use description", "agent examples", "agent tools", "agent colors", "autonomous agent", or needs guidance on agent structure, system prompts, triggering conditions, or agent development best practices for Claude Code plugins.

resolvedSkills.name: SQLite Database Expert
resolvedSkills.description: Expert in SQLite embedded database development for Tauri/desktop applications with focus on SQL injection prevention, migrations, FTS search, and secure data handling

resolvedSkills.name: agent-browser
resolvedSkills.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.

resolvedSkills.name: chrome-devtools
resolvedSkills.description: Expert-level browser automation, debugging, and performance analysis using Chrome DevTools MCP. Use for interacting with web pages, capturing screenshots, analyzing network traffic, and profiling performance.

resolvedSkills.name: connect-apps
resolvedSkills.description: Connect Claude to external apps like Gmail, Slack, GitHub. Use this skill when the user wants to send emails, create issues, post messages, or take actions in external services.

resolvedSkills.name: deployment-engineer
resolvedSkills.description: Expert Deployment Engineer specializing in CI/CD automation, containerization, and release management across diverse platforms. Proficient in Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Azure DevOps, and modern deployment strategies including blue-green deployments and canary releases.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-fix-ci
resolvedSkills.description: Use when a user asks to debug or fix failing GitHub PR checks that run in GitHub Actions; use `gh` to inspect checks and logs, summarize failure context, draft a fix plan, and implement only after explicit approval. Treat external providers (for example Buildkite) as out of scope and report only the details URL.

resolvedSkills.name: mcp-hub
resolvedSkills.description: Access 1200+ AI Agent tools via Model Context Protocol (MCP)

resolvedSkills.name: python
resolvedSkills.description: Python coding guidelines and best practices. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Python code. Enforces PEP 8 style, syntax validation via py_compile, unit test execution, modern Python versions only (no EOL), uv for dependency management when available, and idiomatic Pythonic patterns.

resolvedSkills.name: qmd

Use for querying indexed notes, documentation, meeting transcripts, and any markdown-based knowledge. Requires qmd CLI installed (bun install -g https://github.com/tobi/qmd).

resolvedSkills.name: webapp-testing
resolvedSkills.description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.

resolvedSkills.description: Design and implement automation workflows to save time and scale operations as a solopreneur. resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: video-frames
resolvedSkills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

resolvedSkills.name: wacli
resolvedSkills.description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: abby-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: long-term-memory
resolvedSkills.description: Persistent file-based memory system for AI agents with semantic search, importance scoring, and auto-consolidation. Use when building long-term memory across sessions, tracking decisions/insights/learnings, or needing fast memory search (<20ms).

resolvedSkills.name: market-intel-assistant
resolvedSkills.description: 综合使用 Bird + web_search + CoinGecko 获取市场资讯。适用于获取加密货币、股票、大宗商品等实时信息，包括实时讨论、社区情绪、深度分析和价格数据。

resolvedSkills.name: mlx-stt
resolvedSkills.description: Speech-To-Text with MLX (Apple Silicon) and opensource models (default GLM-ASR-Nano-2512) locally.

resolvedSkills.name: research-strategy
resolvedSkills.description: 自主研究新交易策略的完整流程。必须用 market-intel-assistant 搜索！包含：搜索→实现→回测→评估→决策→记录→循环。

resolvedSkills.name: Agent Development
resolvedSkills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "add an agent", "write a subagent", "agent frontmatter", "when to use description", "agent examples", "agent tools", "agent colors", "autonomous agent", or needs guidance on agent structure, system prompts, triggering conditions, or agent development best practices for Claude Code plugins.

resolvedSkills.name: SQLite Database Expert
resolvedSkills.description: Expert in SQLite embedded database development for Tauri/desktop applications with focus on SQL injection prevention, migrations, FTS search, and secure data handling

resolvedSkills.name: agent-browser
resolvedSkills.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.

resolvedSkills.name: chrome-devtools
resolvedSkills.description: Expert-level browser automation, debugging, and performance analysis using Chrome DevTools MCP. Use for interacting with web pages, capturing screenshots, analyzing network traffic, and profiling performance.

resolvedSkills.name: connect-apps
resolvedSkills.description: Connect Claude to external apps like Gmail, Slack, GitHub. Use this skill when the user wants to send emails, create issues, post messages, or take actions in external services.

resolvedSkills.name: deployment-engineer
resolvedSkills.description: Expert Deployment Engineer specializing in CI/CD automation, containerization, and release management across diverse platforms. Proficient in Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Azure DevOps, and modern deployment strategies including blue-green deployments and canary releases.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-fix-ci
resolvedSkills.description: Use when a user asks to debug or fix failing GitHub PR checks that run in GitHub Actions; use `gh` to inspect checks and logs, summarize failure context, draft a fix plan, and implement only after explicit approval. Treat external providers (for example Buildkite) as out of scope and report only the details URL.

resolvedSkills.name: mcp-hub
resolvedSkills.description: Access 1200+ AI Agent tools via Model Context Protocol (MCP)

resolvedSkills.name: python
resolvedSkills.description: Python coding guidelines and best practices. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Python code. Enforces PEP 8 style, syntax validation via py_compile, unit test execution, modern Python versions only (no EOL), uv for dependency management when available, and idiomatic Pythonic patterns.

resolvedSkills.name: qmd
resolvedSkills.description: Search and retrieve markdown documents from local knowledge bases using qmd. Supports BM25 keyword search, vector semantic search, and hybrid search with LLM re-ranking. Use for querying indexed notes, documentation, meeting transcripts, and any markdown-based knowledge. Requires qmd CLI installed (bun install -g https://github.com/tobi/qmd).

resolvedSkills.name: Skills Usage Guide
resolvedSkills.description: Abby 的 Skills 使用指南。包含所有已安装的 Skills 和 MCPs 的索引，以及如何使用它们的指南。触发词：skills、运用、指南、使用 skill、mcp、工具。

resolvedSkills.name: time-checker
resolvedSkills.description: Check accurate current time, date, and timezone information for any location worldwide using time.is. Use when the user asks "what time is it in X", "current time in Y", or needs to verify timezone offsets.

resolvedSkills.name: webapp-testing
resolvedSkills.description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflows
resolvedSkills.description: Design and implement automation workflows to save time and scale operations as a solopreneur. Use when identifying repetitive tasks to automate, building workflows across tools, setting up triggers and actions, or optimizing existing automations. Covers automation opportunity identification, workflow design, tool selection (Zapier, Make, n8n), testing, and maintenance. Trigger on "automate", "automation", "workflow automation", "save time", "reduce manual work", "automate my business", "no-code automation".

resolvedSkills.name: capability-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-evolver-wrapper
resolvedSkills.description: Feishu-integrated wrapper for the capability-evolver. Manages the evolution loop lifecycle (start/stop/ensure), sends rich Feishu card reports, and provides dashboard visualization. Use when running evolver with Feishu reporting or when managing the evolution daemon.

resolvedSkills.name: minimax_search
resolvedSkills.description: 使用 MiniMax Coding Plan MCP 进行网络搜索和图片理解

resolvedSkills.name: session-init_super_lite
resolvedSkills.description: 超轻量会话初始化。触发词：init-lite / session-init-lite / 超级精简初始化。极简检查，确保低消耗快速启动。

Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.

resolvedSkills.name: gog
resolvedSkills.description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: video-frames
resolvedSkills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

resolvedSkills.name: wacli
resolvedSkills.description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: abby-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Simple time display for Abby. Use when you need to know the current time or count down to a specific time.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 系统化的编码任务方法。通过以下方式确保稳定性：1）开始前完整理解，2）逐步实施，3）每步测试，4）保持稳定回退。在修改代码、调试问题或实现新功能时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: long-term-memory
resolvedSkills.description: Persistent file-based memory system for AI agents with semantic search, importance scoring, and auto-consolidation. Use when building long-term memory across sessions, tracking decisions/insights/learnings, or needing fast memory search (<20ms).

resolvedSkills.name: market-intel-assistant
resolvedSkills.description: 综合使用 Bird + web_search + CoinGecko 获取市场资讯。适用于获取加密货币、股票、大宗商品等实时信息，包括实时讨论、社区情绪、深度分析和价格数据。

resolvedSkills.name: mlx-stt
resolvedSkills.description: Speech-To-Text with MLX (Apple Silicon) and opensource models (default GLM-ASR-Nano-2512) locally.

resolvedSkills.name: research-strategy
resolvedSkills.description: 自主研究新交易策略的完整流程。必须用 market-intel-assistant 搜索！包含：搜索→实现→回测→评估→决策→记录→循环。

resolvedSkills.name: Agent Development
resolvedSkills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "add an agent", "write a subagent", "agent frontmatter", "when to use description", "agent examples", "agent tools", "agent colors", "autonomous agent", or needs guidance on agent structure, system prompts, triggering conditions, or agent development best practices for Claude Code plugins.

resolvedSkills.name: SQLite Database Expert
resolvedSkills.description: Expert in SQLite embedded database development for Tauri/desktop applications with focus on SQL injection prevention, migrations, FTS search, and secure data handling

resolvedSkills.name: agent-browser
resolvedSkills.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.

resolvedSkills.name: chrome-devtools
resolvedSkills.description: Expert-level browser automation, debugging, and performance analysis using Chrome DevTools MCP. Use for interacting with web pages, capturing screenshots, analyzing network traffic, and profiling performance.

resolvedSkills.name: connect-apps
resolvedSkills.description: Connect Claude to external apps like Gmail, Slack, GitHub. Use this skill when the user wants to send emails, create issues, post messages, or take actions in external services.

resolvedSkills.name: deployment-engineer
resolvedSkills.description: Expert Deployment Engineer specializing in CI/CD automation, containerization, and release management across diverse platforms. Proficient in Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Azure DevOps, and modern deployment strategies including blue-green deployments and canary releases.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-fix-ci
resolvedSkills.description: Use when a user asks to debug or fix failing GitHub PR checks that run in GitHub Actions; use `gh` to inspect checks and logs, summarize failure context, draft a fix plan, and implement only after explicit approval. Treat external providers (for example Buildkite) as out of scope and report only the details URL.

resolvedSkills.name: mcp-hub
resolvedSkills.description: Access 1200+ AI Agent tools via Model Context Protocol (MCP)

resolvedSkills.name: python
resolvedSkills.description: Python coding guidelines and best practices. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Python code. Enforces PEP 8 style, syntax validation via py_compile, unit test execution, modern Python versions only (no EOL), uv for dependency management when available, and idiomatic Pythonic patterns.

resolvedSkills.name: qmd
resolvedSkills.description: Search and retrieve markdown documents from local knowledge bases using qmd. Supports BM25 keyword search, vector semantic search, and hybrid search with LLM re-ranking. Use for querying indexed notes, documentation, meeting transcripts, and any markdown-based knowledge. Requires qmd CLI installed (bun install -g https://github.com/tobi/qmd).

resolvedSkills.name: Skills Usage Guide
resolvedSkills.description: Abby 的 Skills 使用指南。包含所有已安装的 Skills 和 MCPs 的索引，以及如何使用它们的指南。触发词：skills、运用、指南、使用 skill、mcp、工具。

resolvedSkills.name: time-checker
resolvedSkills.description: Check accurate current time, date, and timezone information for any location worldwide using time.is. Use when the user asks "what time is it in X", "current time in Y", or needs to verify timezone offsets.

resolvedSkills.name: webapp-testing
resolvedSkills.description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflows
resolvedSkills.description: Design and implement automation workflows to save time and scale operations as a solopreneur. Use when identifying repetitive tasks to automate, building workflows across tools, setting up triggers and actions, or optimizing existing automations. Covers automation opportunity identification, workflow design, tool selection (Zapier, Make, n8n), testing, and maintenance. Trigger on "automate", "automation", "workflow automation", "save time", "reduce manual work", "automate my business", "no-code automation".

resolvedSkills.name: capability-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-evolver-wrapper
resolvedSkills.description: Feishu-integrated wrapper for the capability-evolver. Manages the evolution loop lifecycle (start/stop/ensure), sends rich Feishu card reports, and provides dashboard visualization. Use when running evolver with Feishu reporting or when managing the evolution daemon.

resolvedSkills.name: minimax_search
resolvedSkills.description: 使用 MiniMax Coding Plan MCP 进行网络搜索和图片理解

resolvedSkills.name: session-init_super_lite
resolvedSkills.description: 超轻量会话初始化。触发词：init-lite / session-init-lite / 超级精简初始化。极简检查，确保低消耗快速启动。

skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>clawhub</name>
    <description>Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/clawhub/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/coding-agent/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>

    <name>gh-issues</name>
    <description>Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]</description>
